elements.description: A close-up of a person's hand typing on a laptop keyboard, with a bank login page displayed on the screen. The screen shows a username and password field, with soft blue and white tones. No text, no letters, no numbers, no watermarks.

A simplified illustration of a bank building with a vault door slightly ajar, glowing gold light spilling out. The building has a modern design with glass windows and a blue logo above the entrance. No text, no letters, no numbers, no watermarks.
